summary: P2-B5 outcome tracking (#306): workflow_outcome_records OLTP table + outcome_tracking service records ADR-013 envelope after terminal Celery execution; GET /v1/workflow-outcomes/{approval_id} for internal validation; idempotent per execution; shop-scoped reads; executions without workflow_id skip with warning (P2-B4 compat). 2/2 acceptance tests pass; no CRITICAL findings.

criticalFindings.description: Daily/weekly/monthly cadences return preliminary 'pending' readings — live OLAP rollups deferred to P2-B8+ per scope alignment.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Wire aggregate jobs in P2-B8 before dashboard loader swap.
